narration: Missing Number compares the full expected range with the actual array values.
callout: The missing value is the one that does not get canceled.

narration: XOR all indexes and all array values together, and the matching values disappear.
decision: XOR compare-and-cancel is the whole trick.

predictionPrompt.prompt: Why does the missing number remain after the XOR canceling?

choices.label: Because it has no matching partner to cancel it
choices.feedback: Correct. Everything else appears in both sets and cancels.

choices.label: Because it is always the biggest number
choices.feedback: Not this one. The missing number can be small, middle, or large.

narration: This works because XOR is comparing what should be present with what really is present.
callout: The missing one is the only uncanceled value.
